title: Analytics - Events are not gathered if user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing
scenario: Analytics events are not gathered when user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure the user is logged out of their account.
3. Ensure the user has NOT opted into data-sharing (Analytics consent is off).
4. Trigger an analytics event, e.g., pair or connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device to trigger the device_added event (which gathers the device's serial number).
5. Open Firebase Console and navigate to the Analytics events dashboard.
6. Check the event count for the device_added event filtered by the connected device's serial number.
expected: The event count for the device's serial number should NOT increase, confirming that no analytics events are gathered when the user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing.
